data.title: Dow and S&P 500 up, tech stocks boost, Novo stock surges after FDA approval for weight-loss pill.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index and the S&P 500 experienced an increase driven by tech stocks. Novo's stock also saw a significant surge following FDA approval for a weight-loss pill. The Dow Jones rose by [specific number] points, while the S&P 500 reached a new record high. This positive movement was further supported by Nvidia hitting a key level.
China’s EV Battery Giant, CATL Is Trying To Find A New Road - BBG

data.title: National Bank Holdings Corp got regulatory approvals for acquiring Vista Bancshares, with operations in TX and FL. Shareholders approved the deal on Dec 19, 2025.
data.description: On December 23, 2025, National Bank Holdings Corporation (NYSE: NBHC) announced the receipt of regulatory approvals for the merger of Vista Bancshares, Inc. with operations in Dallas-Ft. Worth, Austin, and Lubbock, Texas, and Palm Beach, Florida, into NBHC. The approvals were obtained from the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System and the Colorado Division of Banking. The merger also includes Vista Bank merging into NBH Bank. The transaction, known as the "Mergers," received shareholder approval from Vista on December 19, 2025. All necessary regulatory clearances have been secured for the completion of the Mergers.

data.title: Inovalis REIT closes €14.0M sale of Baldi Property near Paris, generating $22.9M; 124,000 sq ft with four buildings.
data.description: In Toronto, Inovalis Real Estate Investment Trust (TSX: INO.UN) has successfully finalized the sale of the Baldi property for €14.0 million ($22.9 million). This property, spanning 124,000 square feet and consisting of four buildings surrounding a central courtyard, is situated near the Paris ring road in Saint-Ouen, France. The REIT stated that this marks their second completed disposition in 2025, resulting in around $23 million in cash for the company.

data.title: Princess Cruises christens Star Princess float with Ambassador Jill Whelan; uses Pantalones Tequila.
data.description: In Pasadena, California on December 23, 2025, Princess Cruises honored a maritime tradition by christening their Rose Parade® float in a festive manner. The ceremony included the ceremonial breaking of a bottle of Pantalones Organic Tequila. It was a unique and symbolic event that brought together the spirit of the seas with the excitement of the upcoming Rose Parade®. The event garnered attention from media outlets and onlookers, with images and B-roll footage capturing the moment for viewers to enjoy.

data.title: Billionaire investor Dan Loeb's Third Point LLC increased its stake in Amazon by 4% in Q3 2025. Amazon's Q3 net sales were $180.2B, EPS $1.95. Q4 net sales guided to be $206B to $213B.
data.description: In the third quarter of 2025, Dan Loeb's Third Point LLC increased its stake in Amazon.com, Inc. (NASDAQ: AMZN) by 4%, as revealed in recent 13F filings. As of September 30th, Third Point held 2.81 million shares, up from 2.71 million in the second quarter and 2.35 million in the first quarter of 2025. Amazon reported third-quarter net sales of $180.2 billion, surpassing the consensus estimate of $177.8 billion, with earnings per share at $1.95, above the consensus estimate of $1.57. The company forecasts fourth-quarter net sales between $206.0 billion and $213.0 billion, indicating a growth of 10% to 13% year over year. For more information, the full story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Timbercreek Financial (TSX: TF) declares $0.0575 monthly dividend per share to be paid Jan 15, 2026 to holders on Dec 31, 2025.
data.description: In Toronto on December 23, 2025, Timbercreek Financial (TSX: TF) disclosed its plan to issue a monthly cash dividend of $0.0575 per common share on January 15, 2026. This dividend is for shareholders holding Common Shares as of December 31, 2025.

data.title: Denarius Metals Corp. reveals details for interest payments on convertible unsecured debentures due Dec 31, 2025.
data.description: Denarius Metals Corp. (Cboe CA: DMET) (OTCQX: DNRSF) disclosed the specifics of the upcoming monthly interest payments scheduled for December 31, 2025, pertaining to its convertible unsecured debentures maturing on October 19, 2029. The announcement was made by the company based in Toronto on December 23, 2025.

data.title: CNOOC Limited finds 100 million-ton oilfield in Bohai Sea at Qinhuangdao 29-6. Major discovery in Neogene formations.
data.description: In Hong Kong on December 23, 2025, CNOOC Limited revealed a significant oilfield finding at Qinhuangdao 29-6 in the Bohai Sea's shallow Neogene formations. The Company, listed as SEHK: 00883 (HKD Counter) and 80883 (RMB Counter), as well as SSE: 600938, announced the discovery.

data.title: Daktronics buys IP and equipment from X Display Company to enhance microLED capabilities. Acquisition includes XDC's assets and expertise.
data.description: In Brookings, South Dakota on December 23, 2025, Daktronics (NASDAQ: DAKT), a prominent U.S. company specializing in dynamic video communication displays and control systems globally, revealed the purchase of intellectual property (IP), equipment assets, and technical know-how from X Display Company Technology Limited (XDC). XDC, known for its expertise in mass-transfer processes and MicroLED technology, has had these assets acquired by Daktronics.

data.title: FCPT purchases Crash Champions property in Ohio for $2.6 million, with a nine-year net lease.
data.description: A real estate investment trust known as Four Corners Property Trust (NYSE:FCPT) based in Mill Valley, Calif., has recently acquired a Crash Champions property in Ohio for $2.6 million. This property is situated in a thriving retail area and is operated by the corporation under a long-term, net lease with around nine years remaining on the lease term.

data.title: Character.ai introduces new strategies for scaling up pretraining, utilizing Squinch, dynamic clamping, and Gumbel Softmax, to boost AI model efficiency.
data.description: Character.ai has unveiled new strategies to improve the efficiency of large-scale pretraining. They are concentrating on methods such as Squinch, dynamic clamping, and Gumbel Softmax to enhance AI model training. This development aims to boost performance and productivity in training AI models by utilizing cutting-edge techniques.

data.title: Glenfarne buys 4 solar and battery assets in Chile from METLEN, strengthening their renewable energy portfolio.
data.description: Glenfarne has recently purchased four utility-scale solar and battery assets from METLEN in Chile. This acquisition marks a significant move by Glenfarne into the renewable energy sector in the region. The integrated assets are expected to contribute a total of [insert number] MW of solar energy and [insert number] MWh of battery storage capacity to Chile's growing clean energy market. This acquisition reflects Glenfarne's commitment to expanding its presence in the renewable energy industry and advancing sustainability goals in Chile.

data.title: Can-Fite BioPharma (NYSE American: CANF) announces 1-for-3,000 reverse split of ordinary shares on Jan 2, 2026, trading starts Jan 5.
data.description: Can-Fite BioPharma Ltd., a biotech company focusing on small-molecule drugs for oncological and inflammatory diseases, has disclosed a 1-for-3,000 reverse split of its ordinary shares. The decision was made post the approval by shareholders on November 10, 2025. The Tel-Aviv Stock Exchange will officially implement the reverse split on January 2, 2026, with trading suspended on January 4, 2026. Regular trading for the adjusted ordinary shares will commence on January 5, 2026, marking a significant shift for the company's stakeholders.
